emails.subject: bob lee's bio
emails.body: bob lee's bio Vince, Here's Bob's bio. It's pretty short, but I expanded his picture a bit to= =20 compensate. I also had to convert it from third person to first, so it's a= =20 little "I" heavy. Sam I joined the Pricing and Evaluation Technology Group in June, 2000. I=01,m= =20 currently working on pricing models for commodity options and time series= =20 analysis to relate commodity and equity prices. I have completed an M.S. in Financial Engineering at the University of=20 Michigan in April, 2000 and have also been an independent organization=20 development consultant for 15 years with extensive work in electric and gas= =20 utilities. Prior to that, I managed a methods development group for a=20 nuclear reactor manufacturer for 16 years. From a few years back, I=01,ve earned a BS (Aero. Eng.) from Rensselaer= =20 Polytechnic Institute, an MS (Nuclear Science) from Vanderbilt University a= nd=20 a Ph.D. (Nuclear Engineering) from Rensselaer. When away from Enron, my outside interests include yoga and grandchildren. ___________
